dialogue_level_2_intro: Drag and place each component with care, letting logic guide your design.
When the rightful pieces unite in their proper order, the system awakens and springs to life before your eyes.
Should a false piece be set, the realm will tremble and the pieces return, urging you to try again.
rules_level_2: Carefully drag and place each component in the correct order.
When all pieces are correctly arranged, the system activates.
If an incorrect component is placed, the screen shakes and the piece returns to inventory.
A guide will be provided if requested or after 10 failed attempts.
feedback_level_2_round_1_success: Circuit stands in glory and fame.
